issue_title: Whatsapp share button does not work in mozilla firefox and opera browser
issue_body_preview:
<!-- 
1. Please make sure that you have searched in the older issues before submitting a new one!
2. Please fill out all the required information!
 -->

#### I am submitting a

- [x] Bug Report

#### What is the expected behavior?
click on whatsapp share button it should open whatsapp web
test_description_zh: 在 Mozilla Firefox 或 Opera 浏览器中，打开页面找到 WhatsApp 分享按钮，点击该按钮，观察是否能正常跳转打开 WhatsApp Web 页面。
expected_result_zh: 点击 WhatsApp 分享按钮后，应正常打开 WhatsApp Web 分享页面，链接能被正确处理并跳转，不会出现无响应或链接失效的情况。
